Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 26th, 2008 (Limited) by Focus Features
International Releases: February 5th, 2009 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: March 10th, 2009 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, some sexual content and brief violence.
Running Time: 128 minutes
Award nomination: 2009 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner

Subgenre: Biographical Drama

Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
